creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I'm the new maintainer of the editors/emacs port. To fix the issues mentioned
in this PR, I've submitted a diff in the PR ports/146458, which in addition to
fixing the issues mentioned here also updates version of editors/emacs to the
latest stable version.

I've added various OPTIONS in the port, so users can now customize the build
of Emacs as much as possible.

Can some one close this PR ?

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA

Sent via Gnus from GNU Emacs
